name: serialize_not_injective

name: serialize_short_output
reason: Little-endian encoding of a u64 must always produce exactly 8 bytes; fewer bytes would corrupt downstream parsing of concatenated fields.
output_tail:

name: serialize_exceeds_8_bytes
reason: A u64 serialization longer than 8 bytes would violate the fixed-width encoding invariant and break offset calculations in composite serializations.
